Automation Software That Powers Your Business

DoonPortal builds industry-specific platforms for schools, retail businesses, and dairy farms. Streamline operations, reduce costs, and grow with confidence.

Explore SolutionsBook a Demo

Our Products

Industry-specific automation platforms built for real-world needs.

🏫

School Management System

An all-in-one school management platform that digitizes every aspect of school administration — from student enrollment and attendance to fee collection, exams, and parent communication.

Learn more →
🏪

Inventory POS System

A powerful point-of-sale and inventory management system designed for retail businesses of all sizes. Streamline billing, track stock in real-time, and grow your business with data-driven insights.

Learn more →
🐄

Dairy Management System

A comprehensive dairy management platform that digitizes farm operations — from cattle records and milk production to vendor purchases, quality testing, and financial reporting.

Learn more →

Industries We Serve

Purpose-built automation platforms for the industries that need them most.

🎓

Education

Complete school management with student records, attendance, fees, exams, and parent communication.

🛍️

Retail

Smart POS billing and inventory management to streamline retail operations and boost sales.

🌾

Agriculture

Dairy farm automation with cattle records, milk tracking, vendor management, and financial reporting.

🏢

Small Businesses

Custom automation solutions tailored to your unique business processes and workflows.

Why Choose DoonPortal

What sets us apart from the rest.

⏳

15+ Years Expertise

Over 15 years of experience building automation software for diverse industries across India.

🎯

Industry-Specific Solutions

Purpose-built platforms designed for the unique needs of each industry we serve.

📐

Scalable Architecture

Built to grow with your organization — from a single location to multi-branch operations.

🔧

Customizable Platforms

Flexible configurations and modules that adapt to your specific workflows and requirements.

🤝
